Transcrição Completa: Do You Need A Website For Your Agency

 

[00:00] [music] Do you need a website or not for your agency? Number one, I give you a funnel for your agency.

 

[00:06] All the stuff I've used from the beginning and the stuff I still use today to represent my agency online, you get all you need is a ClickFunnels account.

 

[00:14] To be very clear, Clickfunnels I fully endorse over all the other funnel building tools and over WordPress and all the other stuff out there that you're going to dive into.

 

[00:23] Clickfunnels for me has always worked the best because I have gotten more support from them than any other company that I've ever worked with.

 

[00:30] They have upsold support as well where you can get a literal representative of their company assigned to your account.

 

[00:37] That way you can have more frequent communication when you're really building things out.

 

[00:42] My team and I, we were one of the top 30 Clickfunnel designers in the world in uh early 2017 when they had their designathon.

 

[00:51] That was an incredible experience to be able to have some of my team members go to Boise, Idaho, meet some of the ClickFunnels members, just further our relationships there.

 

[01:01] I love ClickFunnels over all the other companies out there that you can use to build funnels and to build websites due to the fact that they are worth hundreds of millions of dollars.

 

[01:11] Money makes a big difference to being able to expand your support teams, to be able to expand your development teams and support people like you and I who are using these tools aggressively for ourselves and for our clients.

 

[01:23] The features, the functionality, the speed of turnaround, the integrations to all the other third-party tools that we use, marketing automation softwares, payment processors, all of it.

 

[01:34] I love every single thing. More importantly though, I love this feature called sharable links.

 

[01:40] So, my agency funnels that I have, the reason it's so easy for me to give you my funnels is because all you have to do with the sharable links, click on it.

 

[01:48] Uh there's a link below in the description here. It'll [clears throat] automatically, if you have a ClickFunnels account, share my funnel into your account.

 

[01:56] There's nothing else you have to do besides edit it, rebrand it, change the copy up, change the videos up specific to your services, your agency, of course, and you'll be good to go.

 

[02:06] That's one of the biggest benefits of being inside of this program. Everything I've already done, I just give to you, just like my legal agreements, my resources, my scripts, everything I use today.

 

[02:17] So, to be very clear, feel free to go into the group after you've created and retailored the funnel and the agency homepage for your business uh to get some criticism in the group in the community online so you can see where you can make some improvements considering you might be just starting off and not really knowing what you're doing yet.

 

[02:35] You don't need it when you're first getting started. I've had no problem in my first 45 days sending out it was at the time instead of the perfect code video pitch, it was called the perfect code email.

 

[02:47] It was the same concept as the perfect code video pitch where we break down what we do for people, how it works and why.

 

[02:53] But back in the day, I used to use different tools, take screenshots and type up a very customized, value-driven email for each person that we were pitching.

 

[03:03] And through that process, we would have because we delivered value upfront and showed people what they could really do to make more money.

 

[03:11] There was a very rare occasion when somebody would say, "Hey, I need to see your website in order to do business with you."

 

[03:17] You know, when you approach people with value, showing them what you can do for them or what they can do themselves that can make them more leads and drive them more money into their business, you're always going to have a step up over the person who simply thinks, "Oh, I need to I need to have my website. I need to be post on social media every day and I need to be doing this and that."

 

[03:37] Which has nothing to do with building value for the other person that you're trying to create a business relationship with.

 

[03:43] So to be very clear, it does make you look better. It does make you look more professional depending on the standard in which you build it out to.

 

[03:51] It can also represent what you can do for other people when you choose to build funnels or sell funnels for them or strategically for uh your clients to other people who can build funnels.

 

[04:02] It does make you look better. It's like when you go to a business event and somebody says, "Hey, can I see your card?"

 

[04:08] You know, the person who has the metal card, right? They usually get that unique, "Oh, wow. Look, this person spent a bunch of extra money and has a really nice business card."

 

[04:18] Nowadays, the same thing can be done with a funnel. You get the same mental impression and the same mental effect.

 

[04:25] So, I want to be clear. I give you my funnels. I give you all the stuff I use for my agency homepage. All you need is a Click Funnels account and then you just press on the little sharable link in the description below and just goes right in.

 

[04:37] Rebrand it. Uh, you know, change up the copy in the videos and make it specific to your business. You'll be good to go.

 

[04:43] If you want to do something completely different, that's great. Post what you've currently created and say, "Hey guys, what do you think about this? Is this going to help me or hurt me in my business and get more clients?"

 

[04:54] And from uh from there, you'll get a lot more perspective on what you should do. I'll see you in the next video.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Top 30 designers ClickFunnels mundialmente em 2017

Primeiros 45 dias de operação sem website

ClickFunnels vale centenas de milhões de dólares

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Uso de ClickFunnels como plataforma principal para agências

Sistema de "sharable links" para duplicar funnels

Perfect Code Email (predecessor do Perfect Code Video Pitch)

Abordagem value-first antes de apresentar website

Customização de emails com screenshots e valor agregado

Processo de feedback comunitário para otimização

 

ESTRUTURA:

Funnel de agência completo fornecido (templates prontos)

Homepage de agência incluída

Recursos legais, scripts e materiais inclusos

Suporte dedicado ClickFunnels disponível (upgrade)

Integração com ferramentas terceiras (automação, pagamentos)

Comunidade para revisão e críticas construtivas

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não é necessário investimento inicial em website

Economia ao usar templates prontos vs desenvolvimento custom

ClickFunnels como investimento único necessário

 

DURAÇÃO: ~5:00 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/tutorial para donos de agências digitais
